title: Steve Trindall
extract:
Steve Trindall born 23 April 1973 in Wee Waa, New South Wales, Australia is a former professional rugby league footballer who played in the 1990s and 2000s.  Trindall's position of choice is as a prop.
He played for the Canberra Raiders, the North Sydney Bears, the Northern Eagles and the Wests Tigers in Australia. In the Super League he played for the London Broncos and also played for Whitehaven.
